events.fact: Grandpa Bud begins planning the relocation of livestock pens to the Westshore.
Construction begins on the roof and eaves of the West-Thwaite outbuilding.
Harvested Iron-Bark from an oak tree for building materials.
Construction of an X-frame chimney for the outbuilding.
Installation of a cooking station and troubleshooting of chimney airflow.
Excavation begins on a moat surrounding the West-Thwaite farm area, reaching sea level.
Milestone: Two boars successfully completed the taming process.
Planted Iron-Bark saplings (oak and birch) near the new settlement.
Structural modification of the Othala house to revert previous additions.
Milestone: Three piglets are born in the livestock pen.
Discovery of structural damage to Othala caused by a previous Norns' Trial (raid).
Grandpa Bud outlines plans to move to Shadow-Garth Forge to smelt Frost-Tears and enter the Silver Age.
